# Foreshore

Trend-intelligence for the wellness sector — what the tide is bringing in, published through the dual-native engine.

## Machine Surface
- Trust contract: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/o/trust.json
- Object index: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/o/index.json
- Claim index: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/o/claims.json
- Alias index: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/o/aliases.json
- API catalog: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- Optional live API overlay: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/api/
- Optional MCP overlay: https://foreshore.permanentupperclass.com/mcp
